steps: Go to https://console.plivo.com/accounts/register/ and create a free account
Verify your email address and complete phone verification
Log in to the Plivo console at https://console.plivo.com/dashboard/
Your Auth ID and Auth Token are displayed at the top of the Dashboard overview page
Copy the 'Auth ID' (this is your username for Basic Auth)
Copy the 'Auth Token' (this is your password for Basic Auth)
Plivo uses HTTP Basic Auth — combine as Base64(AUTH_ID:AUTH_TOKEN) in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Auth ID
credential_fields.description: Your Plivo Auth ID, used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth (Authorization: Basic base64(AUTH_ID:AUTH_TOKEN))

notes: Plivo uses HTTP Basic Auth with Auth ID as username and Auth Token as password
Auth ID cannot be changed; Auth Token can be regenerated at Account > Settings > Credentials
Free trial account includes $0.10 credit for testing
Trial accounts can only send SMS to verified numbers
The Auth Token should be treated as a password and never committed to source control

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account details using your Auth ID in the path
